title: fix(deps): update module github.com/openshift/imagebuilder to v1.2.14

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>openshift/imagebuilder (github.com/openshift/imagebuilder)</summary>

### [`v1.2.14`](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.14)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.13...v1.2.14)

#### What's Changed

-   TestDispatchArgTargetPlatformGood(): ensure that TARGETOS can be set by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/294](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/294)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.13...v1.2.14

### [`v1.2.13`](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.13)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.12...v1.2.13)

#### What's Changed

-   NewStages(): resolve stage names using ARGs by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/293](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/293)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.12...v1.2.13

### [`v1.2.12`](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.12)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.11...v1.2.12)

#### What's Changed

-   shellWord.processDollar(): handle #, %, and / by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/288](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/288)
-   Ignore no docker configuration found error by [@​zhujian7](https://togithub.com/zhujian7) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/290](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/290)
-   Tweak ARG processing, particularly for BUILD... and TARGET... by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/289](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/289)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​zhujian7](https://togithub.com/zhujian7) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/290](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/290)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.11...v1.2.12

</details>
